qa_pair.question: Call content_align_curriculum with gradeLevel "國中一年級" and domain "數學". How many entries are in the returned coreCompetencies array?
Call content_align_curriculum with gradeLevel "國中一年級" and domain "數學". What is the value of the returned 'framework' field?
Call content_align_curriculum with gradeLevel "Grade 5" and domain "english". What is the returned 'domain' field (the canonical domain it maps to)?
Call content_align_curriculum with gradeLevel "Grade 1" and domain "Underwater Basketweaving" (an unknown domain). How many entries are in the returned coreCompetencies array (the generic fallback)?
Call content_generate_quiz with topic "Cells", questionCount 10, and NO draftQuestions. In the required Bloom distribution of the returned brief, how many 'apply' questions are requested?
Call content_generate_quiz with topic "Cells", questionCount 10, and NO draftQuestions. In the required Bloom distribution of the returned brief, how many 'analyze' questions are requested?
Call content_generate_quiz with topic "Cells", questionCount 10, and NO draftQuestions. In the required Bloom distribution of the returned brief, how many 'remember' questions are requested?
Call content_generate_quiz with topic "Energy", questionCount 20, and NO draftQuestions. In the required Bloom distribution of the returned brief, how many 'apply' questions are requested?
Call content_align_curriculum with gradeLevel "國中二年級" and domain "自然科學". How many Bloom levels are in the returned bloomFocus array?

Call content_generate_quiz with topic "T", questionCount 1, and draftQuestions set to a single multiple_choice question that has bloomLevel "analyze", two options (one correct), and a non-empty explanation. What is the returned depth.higherOrderRatio?
